zh.lifeSummary: 當Conde de Portugal Henrique de Borgonha於1066年6月6日出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達迪喬時，他的父親Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne30歲，母親Sibylle de Barcelone1歲。他於1094年與Condesa Teresa de Leon Senhora de Portugal在葡萄牙結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1112年登記服兵役。他去世於1112年5月12日在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安利安阿斯托爾加享年45歲，埋葬在葡萄牙布拉加布拉加。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Conde de Portugal Henrique de Borgonha于1066年6月6日出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達迪喬时，他的父亲Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne30岁，母亲Sibylle de Barcelone1岁。他于1094年与Condesa Teresa de Leon Senhora de Portugal在葡萄牙结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1112年登记服兵役。他去世于1112年5月12日在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安利安阿斯托爾加享年45岁，埋葬在葡萄牙布拉加布拉加。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Henrique
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.description: Afonso inherits the County of Portugal, a province of Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Conde de Portugal Henrique de Borgonha was born on 6 June 1066, in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, his father, Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne, was 30 and his mother, Sibylle de Barcelone, was 1. He married Condesa Teresa de Leon Senhora de Portugal in 1094, in Portugal. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He registered for military service in 1112. He died on 12 May 1112, in Astorga, León, Castilla y León, Spain, at the age of 45, and was buried in Braga, Braga, Portugal.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Conde de Portugal Henrique de Borgonha est né le 6 juin 1066, à Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Sibylle de Barcelone, avait 1 ans. Il a épousé Condesa Teresa de Leon Senhora de Portugal en 1094, à Portugal. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1112. Il est décédé le 12 mai 1112, à Astorga, León, Castilla y León, Espagne, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Braga, Braga, Portugal.

de.lifeSummary: Als Conde de Portugal Henrique de Borgonha am 6. Juni 1066 in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne 30 und seine Mutter Sibylle de Barcelone 1. Er hat 1094 in Portugal Condesa Teresa de Leon Senhora de Portugal geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er hat sich 1112 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 12. Mai 1112 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Astorga, León, Castilla y León, Spanien und wurde in Braga, Braga, Portugal begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Conde de Portugal Henrique de Borgonha è nato il il 6 giugno 1066 nel Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, il suo padre, Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Sibylle de Barcelone, aveva 1 anni. Lui sposato Condesa Teresa de Leon Senhora de Portugal nel 1094, nel Portogallo. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1112. Morì il 12 maggio 1112, nel Astorga, León, Castilla y León, Spagna, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Braga, Braga, Portogallo.

ko.lifeSummary: Conde de Portugal Henrique de Borgonha(이)가 1066년 6월 6일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 디조에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibylle de Barcelone(은)는 1세였다. 그는 1094년 포르투갈에서 Condesa Teresa de Leon Senhora de Portugal(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1112년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1112년 5월 12일 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 레o 애스토르가에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 포르투갈 브라가 브라가에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Conde de Portugal Henrique de Borgonha nasceu em 6 de junho de 1066, em Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Sibylle de Barcelone, tinha 1 anos. Ele casou-se com Condesa Teresa de Leon Senhora de Portugal em 1094, em Portugal. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1112. Ele faleceu em 12 de maio de 1112, em Astorga, León, Castilla y León, Espanha, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Braga, Braga, Portugal.

ru.Astorga, León, Castilla y León, Espanha: асторга, леoн, кастилла и леoн, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Conde de Portugal Henrique de Borgonha родился 6 июня 1066 г. в местности диджон, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibylle de Barcelone, 1. Он женился на женщине по имени Condesa Teresa de Leon Senhora de Portugal в 1094 г. в местности Португалия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1112 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 12 мая 1112 г. в местности асторга, леoн, кастилла и леoн, Испания в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности брага, брага, Португалия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Conde de Portugal Henrique de Borgonha nació el 6 de junio de 1066, en Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Sibylle de Barcelone, tenía 1 años. Se casó con Condesa Teresa de Leon Senhora de Portugal en 1094, en Portugal. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1112. Murió el 12 de mayo de 1112, en Astorga, León, Castilla y León, España, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Braga, Braga, Portugal.
